---
title: "Open Government Data, opendata.swiss"
date: "2026-02-22"
output: html_document
---

## Dataset: subline-v2

Neue Version v2 der Stammdaten und Metadaten vom System atlas (https://atlas.app.sbb.ch), bereitgestellt seit 7. Januar 2026 (atlas-v2).

[Direct link by **opendata.swiss** for dataset](https://opendata.swiss/de/dataset/subline-v2)<br>
[Direct link by **Geschäftsstelle Systemaufgaben Kundeninformation (SBB AG)** for dataset](https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/subline-v2)

Auto-generated R starter code for the dataset subline-v2@oevch.

## Metadata

- **Publisher.name** `nan`
- **Organization.display_name.de** `Geschäftsstelle Systemaufgaben Kundeninformation (SBB AG)`
- **Organization.url** `https://www.opentransportdata.swiss`
- **Maintainer** `None`
- **Maintainer_email** `None`
- **Keywords.de** `[]`
- **Issued** `2026-01-05T23:00:00`
- **Metadata_created** `2026-01-07T00:48:02.395829`
- **Metadata_modified** `2026-02-22T00:22:43.303310`


# Load packages

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)

```

# Load data

-   The dataset has 3 distribution(s) in CSV format.
-   All available CSV distributions are listed below and can be read into a tibble.

```{r}

# Distribution 0
# Package_id               : e13fcc66-80e9-4f33-90bc-7a9f48943a78
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-21T01:19:06.856352
# Modified                 : 2026-02-21T01:19:06.856352
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/5605951a-0d40-44a6-b31a-730a2f503160/resource/6c9fb800-ce8b-4f37-b191-642d4290c42c/download/timetable-years-subline.csv')

# Distribution 1
# Package_id               : e13fcc66-80e9-4f33-90bc-7a9f48943a78
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-21T01:19:05.093440
# Modified                 : 2026-02-21T01:19:05.093440
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/5605951a-0d40-44a6-b31a-730a2f503160/resource/450dd71e-a026-4335-a9c9-c09a21e413bc/download/full-subline.csv')

# Distribution 2
# Package_id               : e13fcc66-80e9-4f33-90bc-7a9f48943a78
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-21T01:19:03.260801
# Modified                 : 2026-02-21T01:19:03.260801
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/5605951a-0d40-44a6-b31a-730a2f503160/resource/d1b90a2f-7d77-470b-b5b5-49bad50865b0/download/actual-date-subline.csv')



```

# Analyze data

```{r}

glimpse(df)
str(df)
skim(df)

head(df)
tail(df)

```

# Continue your code here...

```{r}

```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Contact

opendata@sbb.ch | Open data platform mobility Switzerland
